name: Sanctioned Exile
visual_description: A chain-mailed soldier with ceremonial insignia on his revolver-style pistol, pointing the weapon at a massive armored figure mid-vanishment, ethereal light tearing the target away. Frozen moment of authoritarian judgment and exile, tight dramatic framing.
full_prompt: A chain-mailed soldier with ceremonial insignia on his revolver-style pistol, pointing the weapon at a massive armored figure mid-vanishment, ethereal light tearing the target away. Frozen moment of authoritarian judgment and exile, tight dramatic framing.. Stylized digital illustration, structured balanced composition, warm sandstone and ivory tones, golden-hour lighting with long shadows, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
